titleStmt.title: SII 28.201: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 201. (A.R. No. 356 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, west gōpuram. right of entrance.
The record says that the ruler was born under the asterism, Viśākha, as Kochchi-pperum-paḍaippu-mūtta[var*] and to have belonged to the family (?) of Chēramāṉ-perumāḷ.

It records the institution of a sandhi named after the ruler to be performed at the time fixed for the anointment of God Ānanda-tāṇḍava-pperumāḷ-nāyaṉār, at which time 33 plates of food had to be offered to the deity. These thirty three plates of food were to be distributed in equal proportion to the brāhmaṇas, māhēsvaras and those that cook the food.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§śubhamastu . svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 4 100 9 10 8 ṉmel cellā niṉṟa dhātu varuṣam
mārkaḻi mātam 10 2 2 svāmi cidambareśvaraṉukku ceramāṉ perumāḷ nāyaṉār
�tṛntu kocci perumpaṭaippu mūtta vicāka nāḷ piṟanta rāmapaṉma makā
rācāviṉ taṉmamāka Āṉantatāṇṭavapperumāḷ nāyaṉār Apiṣeka kāla
ttil rāmavaṉmaṉ canti tirumuṉ taḷikai Āka Apiṣeka kaṭṭaḷaiyile taḷikai
10 2caṟuva kaṭṭaḷaiyile taḷikai 9m neykkaṭṭaḷaiyile taḷikai kū vaṭaik
kaṭṭaḷaiyile taḷikai 3m Uccava kaṭṭaḷaiyile taḷikai 3m Ākattaḷikai 3 10 3
rāmavaṉma makārācāviṉ taṉmamāka Āṉanta tāṇṭavap perumāḷ nāyaṉār caṉṉi
tiyile naivettiyam paṇṇi Itu celavu pirāmaṇa pocaṉattukku taḷikai 10 1m
mākeśvararukku taḷikai 10 1m camaikkiṟa perukku taḷikai 10 1m Ākttaḷikai [3 10 3]
kocci rācāviṉ kāriyam citampareśvaraṉ Apiṣeka kaṭṭaḷaik kāliṅkarāyaṉ
me vaṉa ppittapaṭiye Añcu kaṭṭaḷaiyārum taṉmam naṭatta kaṭavarkaḷāka
Apiṣeka kaṭṭaḷai kāliṅkarāyaṉ
Digital edition of SII 28.201 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
